    ↑(∏ k ∈ Icc 1 (primeCountingReal x), nth Nat.Prime k / (nth Nat.Prime k - 1))

          have h₄ : (p : ℝ) - 1 > 0 := by linarith
          field_simp [h₄.ne']

have h₁ : ⌊x⌋.natAbs = ⌊x⌋₊ := by
          simp [Nat.floor_eq_floor]
        rw [h₁, primeCountingReal, dif_pos (by linarith)]
        have h₂ : primesBelow ⌊x⌋₊ = Finset.image (nth Nat.Prime) (Icc 1 (primeCounting ⌊x⌋₊)) := by
          apply Eq.symm
          apply Finset.ext
          intro p
          simp only [Finset.mem_image, Finset.mem_Icc, Nat.succ_le_iff, Nat.pos_iff_ne_zero,
            Nat.prime_iff_nat_prime, Nat.Prime.ne_zero, Nat.Prime.pos, and_true]
          constructor
          · intro hp
            use primeCounting_le p hp
            simp [nth_primeCounting_eq hp]
          · rintro ⟨k, hk₁, hk₂, rfl⟩
            exact Nat.Prime.nth_le k (by linarith)
        rw [h₂]
        apply Finset.prod_image
        intro i hi j hj hij
        simp_all [Nat.Prime.ne_zero, Nat.Prime.pos]
        exact Nat.Prime.nth_inj (by linarith) (by linarith)
